# stb_image vendor file

Place the official `stb_image.h` file in this directory before building the optional LWLGL STB shim.

Run `scripts/fetch-stb.sh` or `scripts/fetch-stb.ps1` to fetch it from the upstream `nothings/stb` repository.

`stb_image.h` is an upstream third-party dependency and keeps its own license terms.
